title: Teyana Taylor Sends Message to Black Women as She Accepts First Golden Globe: 'We Belong in Every Room We Walk Into'
text: Singer and actress Teyana Taylor secured her first Golden Globe award in the best supporting actress category for her performance in director Paul Thomas Anderson's film One Battle After Another, where she portrayed Perfidia Beverly Hills. During her acceptance remarks, Taylor addressed her daughters watching from upstairs at the Beverly Hilton, expressing gratitude to Anderson for his direction and vision. She concluded with an empowering statement dedicated to Black women and girls, declaring: Our softness is not a liability. Our depth is not too much. Our light does not need permission to shine. We belong in every room we walk into. Taylor competed against fellow nominees Amy Madigan, Elle Fanning, Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas, Emily Blunt, and Ariana Grande. The award marked her inaugural Golden Globe nomination and victory.
